nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Young woman practicing yoga on a sun-drenched rooftop overlooking a coastal city, photorealistic live-action movie scene, cinematic shallow depth of field, soft morning haze, sweat glistening on her skin with realistic texture, minimalist concrete and glass architecture, warm golden hour lighting, peaceful and disciplined atmosphere, lifestyle drama film feeling, alluring and serene composition, precise cinematography capturing the city awakening in the background.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 泛黄，发绿，模糊，低分辨率，低质量图像，扭曲的肢体，诡异的外观，丑陋，AI感，噪点，网格感，JPEG压缩条纹，异常的肢体，水印，乱码，意义不明的字符, signiture, asian

nodes.title: Style
widgets_values: "A man sitting alone on a weathered wooden bench on a 1960s European train station platform, seen from behind. He sits upright, one hand gripping the handle of a large vintage leather travel trunk resting on the ground between his feet, worn and well-travelled, with brass clasps and leather straps. He looks toward a train stopped at the platform, its doors open. The train consists of old passenger carriages — dark green painted steel, riveted bodywork, small square windows with pull-down frames, worn paint, heavy iron door handles. Steam visible around the wheels and undercarriage. The platform is quiet, almost empty. Worn concrete underfoot, old iron pillars supporting the station roof. Overcast diffused daylight, soft shadows. Post-war urban European setting. The man wears a plain dark coat and trousers. Medium shot, camera positioned directly behind the figure at eye level, the train and open doors filling the view ahead. Cinematic photorealistic style reminiscent of French New Wave cinema photography. Muted desaturated color palette with cool grey tones. Sharp focus on the figure and bench, soft focus on the train beyond. Correct human anatomy, natural posture. No text, no watermark, no logos."
